steps.title: Fastest check: compare a table or graph
steps.content: For an equivalent-expression question, enter the original expression and the answer choices in a calculator table or graph. The correct choice must match for several inputs, not just one. The matching choice is B, $16x+240$.

steps.title: Algebra check
steps.content: Use the work below to confirm the identity for every allowed input. This matters because one random matching input is only a quick screen, not a proof that two expressions are always equivalent.

steps.title: Distribute $16$
steps.content: Apply the distributive property to both terms inside the parentheses: $$16(x+15)=16x+16(15).$$

steps.title: Confirm the choice
steps.content: B is correct. Forgetting to multiply $15$ by $16$ or using a different constant term would not preserve the distributive property applied to both terms.
